return(function(...)local return(function(A,S,D,C,I,O,r,P,s,E,U,d,F,e,Y,q,Z,v,N,G,g,x,W,o)W,Z,F,P,d,E,G,U,N,e,o,v,g,s,x,q,Y=function(A)local b,o=608709+-608708,A[735773+-735772]while o do D=function(D,C,I,O,r,N,q)return o(A,{D;C,I;O,r,N;q},b,S)end return D end,function(A,b)local S=Z(b)local D=function(D,C,I,O,r)return o(A,{D;C,I;O,r},b,S)end return D end,{},function(A,b)local S=Z(b)local D=function(...)return o(A,{...},b,S)end return D end return(Y(8426665-(-33635),{}))(S(r))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[b(-461754+456935)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
